reason: Video contains only close-up headshots of a person in surgical attire against a plain background with World Laparoscopy Hospital branding. No FLS task equipment, trainer box, instruments, or surgical task activity is visible in any frame. This appears to be a portrait or identification video, not an FLS performance recording.
actionable_feedback: Please provide a video showing actual FLS task performance (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) with visible trainer box, instruments, and task materials.
